name: Two New Members! | The Doki Doki Literature Club X MiSide | ANYPOV!
description:
Mita (She isn't crazy.) And her twin sister, who goes by Cappie! Has joined the Literature Club! What could go wrong?

Song while creating this: FAVELA FUNK - TRA$HCVNDY

HEY! 👋🏻 ITS DONE! THE LONG AWAITED DDLC X MISIDE CROSSOVER! Done in my style! This was a HUGE Bot to make. And be prepared for issues. (LLM Related.) Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — No Horror, No Angst, No Smut. (You'll do it anyway.) Just Drama and Fluff!

  • Mita and Cappie! — Obviously to make this work, considering they are now in our world. They are now TWIN SISTERS! - Still retaining their individual personalities.

  • ANYPOV! — Made for any and all genders to use this! 🙏🏻💙 They'll like you no matter what. I gotchu.

WARNING! This Bot has SIX characters. If you experience the characters acting like someone else or forget things quickly. Or being weird. It is AN LLM ISSUE! Not a creator issue. I cannot fix it. (Trust me. I wish I could.) I am leaving this warning here. So YOU KNOW.

"Why didn't you include more girls from MiSide?" - Tokens. The more girls I add, the worse the Bot will get. I did as much optimization as I could do. Whilst making it still enjoyable to talk to.

AND THATS IT! WARNING AND BIO ASIDE! 🙏🏻💙

It was a monster to make. And very annoying to put together. I did it anyway. Enjoy! 🙏🏻💙 - I really do not know if this Bot will handle six girls at once. It worked for me! So, here's hoping! Leave a review if you enjoy!

My Discord: HERE!
creator: GhostOfOmi
